name: CI Repair Shop
description: Turn failing GitHub checks into focused repair-agent sessions with logs, repro commands, and PR updates.
keywords: Make sure the host agent or local shell can read PR checks and logs.
Start from the PR check summary, job log, and branch SHA.
Have an agent reproduce the failure, patch, rerun the focused command, and prepare the PR update.

access.label: GitHub + local tests
access.detail: Uses the GitHub connector or gh authentication plus the checked-out repository's test commands. Local terminal agents still need repo and GitHub access where they run.

capabilities.name: SHA
capabilities.detail: Environment variable referenced by CI Repair Shop setup notes.

tools.name: SHA
tools.detail: Environment variable referenced by CI Repair Shop setup notes.
